subcodes.first_line: O ye two steadfast ones in the Covenant! His Honour Siyyid Mustafa, upon him be the glory of God, who standeth firm in service to the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان حضرت آقا سید مصطفی علیه بهاء الله قائم بر خدمت امرالله
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @humility; meekness; lowliness
